original_file: UKKA_Initial Management of IgAN in Children and Young Adult.md
title: The initial management of IgA vasculitis (Henoch Schonlein Purpura) in children and young people
summary: This document provides clinical practice guidelines for the initial management of IgA vasculitis (Henoch-Schönlein purpura) in children and young people, developed by a multi-speciality group. The guidelines cover diagnosis, treatment options, and management strategies, including recommendations based on systematic evidence reviews and stakeholder consultation. The document details the methodology used to create these recommendations.
